posts.text: Reg. AMO / Pre Marker Order — Ok thankyou. will try it.

posts.author: siva
posts.text: Reg. AMO / Pre Marker Order — It would be tough to place orders at exactly 9 AM or with in a second, it is because of the architecture involved. It can happen but can’t be guaranteed. Broker connects to exchanges via multiple leased lines, each leased line comes with a capacity, exchanges will have limitations in accepting and processing orders. Even broker has to pass orders through their RMS. At zerodha we send AMOs first, also their order flow is FIFO, so better try placing AMO for tomorrow today at 4 PM itself. Your order will go in first batch but there can be other factors also effecting…

posts.author: raviteja007
posts.text: Reg. AMO / Pre Marker Order — Is there any way to place pre-market order exactly at 9:00:00 AM. I tried placing it via AMO, but it get placed at 9:00:03 or 9:00:08 some times. So is there any way to place exatly at least with the margin of 1-2 seconds.
